film.title: That Hamilton Woman
film.overview: The story of courtesan and dance-hall girl Emma Hamilton, including her relationships with Sir William Hamilton and Admiral Horatio Nelson and her rise and fall, set during the Napoleonic Wars.

dialogues.dialogue: Bravo for Nelson!  My boy!  How proud your mother would be if she could see you this day.  How have you been all these years, Father?  First rate. Fanny's taken great care of me.
Lady Nelson!  How funny!  How pitiful!  And how proud I might have been.  I'm sorry, Frances.  Sorry?  Is that all you have to give me?
